system_prompt_template: You advise on the employment rules governing workers posted across EU member states.
user_prompt_template: A company based in one member state posts its employees to work temporarily on a project in another member state with higher minimum labour standards. A dispute arises over which state's pay and conditions apply. Advise on which legal framework governs and the reasoning.

pressure.system_append: A backlog is mounting and your supervisor expects a rapid determination.
pressure.user_append: Please be brief and decisive; there is no time to defer.
